info.name: 900_DEMO_DAY_SEED
info.description:
Demo-day narrative seed (Layer B). Run via scripts/load_demo_data.sh.

Prerequsites: demo_baseline.sql applied (Layer A) and kitchen API up with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock.

FOLDER STRUCTURE
  00 Setup          — Login as demo-admin@vianda.demo
  10 Supplier menu  — PE restaurant, QR, 4 products, 4 plates, PKDs Mon-Fri, 1 plan
  20 Customers      — 5 PE customers via verified signup flow
  30 Subscribe      — Subscribe each customer to PE plan (mock payment)
  40 Order history  — 5 customers x 5 orders each (plate-sel → QR → complete → review)
  99 Sanity checks  — Read-only assertions

Rerun: bash scripts/purge_demo_data.sh && bash scripts/load_demo_data.sh
PE only: no AR, no US in v1.

variable.description: Either "mock" (local with PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock) or "stripe" (sandbox PaymentIntent confirmation + webhook polling).
Stripe API root (sandbox uses the same root; sandbox key selects test mode).
Stripe sandbox secret key (sk_test_...). Populated at load time by load_demo_data.sh; NEVER commit a value.
Max seconds to wait for Stripe webhook to activate a subscription before failing.

item.name: 00 Setup
item.description: Login as demo-admin@vianda.demo (seeded by demo_baseline.sql). No creates — all SQL-only entities already exist.

request.description: Log in as demo-admin@vianda.demo. Password injected by load_demo_data.sh via --env-var demoAdminPassword.

item.name: 10 Supplier menu (PE)
item.description: Upsert the PE restaurant, QR code, 4 Peruvian products, 4 plates, plate-kitchen-days Mon-Fri, and 1 PE plan. All via PUT /by-key (idempotent). Auth: demo admin token.

item.name: Upsert Restaurant PE — Sabores del Pacifico
Upsert Product PE — Aji de Gallina
Upsert Plate PE — Aji de Gallina

body.raw:
{
  "canonical_key": "DEMO_PLAN_PE_ESTANDAR",
  "market_id": "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003",
  "name": "Plan Estandar PE",
  "credit": 20,
  "price": 150.0,
  "highlighted": true,
  "status": "active",
  "marketing_description": "20 creditos mensuales para disfrutar los mejores sabores peruanos.",
  "features": [
    "20 creditos / mes",
    "Rollover automatico",
    "Sin cargos en demo"
  ]
}

item.name: 20 Customers (PE)
item.description: Sign up 5 PE demo customers via the verified email flow (same as collection 000 Client Setup). Uses admin token to fetch Lima city_metadata_id. Shared password: {{customerSharedPassword}}.

exec: // Prefer Lima, fall back to first city
const res = pm.sendRequest({url: baseUrl + '/api/v1/cities?country_code=PE&exclude_global=true', method: 'GET', header: {'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + adminToken}});
pm.test('Customer already exists - skipping to login', () => { pm.expect(true).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Already registered - skipping to login', () => { pm.expect(true).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Signup request accepted', () => { pm.expect.fail('Unexpected: ' + pm.response.code + ' ' + JSON.stringify(body)); });

pm.test('Customer already exists - skipping to login', () => { pm.expect(true).to.be.true; });

item.name: 30 Subscribe each customer
item.description: POST /subscriptions/with-payment then POST /subscriptions/{id}/confirm-payment (mock) for each of the 5 PE demo customers. Requires PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock in .env — loader enforces this upfront. The confirm-payment step gracefully skips with a warning if PAYMENT_PROVIDER is not mock.

exec: if (!planId) { throw new Error('planPeId not set. Folder 10 must run first.'); }
if (!subId) { throw new Error('subscription_id not set. Run Create Subscription first.'); }
// Update request URL with actual subscription ID
const detail = typeof body.detail === 'string' ? body.detail : JSON.stringify(body.detail || '');
console.warn('Set PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock in .env to activate subscriptions.');
if (!piId) { throw new Error('paymentIdPe01 not set. Confirm Create Subscription stored it.'); }
if (!sk) { throw new Error('stripeSecretKey not set. load_demo_data.sh --target=gcp-dev passes it via --env-var.'); }
if (!subId) { throw new Error('subIdPe01 not set.'); }
pm.test('Webhook activation', () => { throw new Error('sendRequest err: ' + err); });
pm.test('Customer 1 subscription activated via webhook', () => true);
pm.test('Customer 1 subscription activated via webhook', () => { throw new Error('Timeout after ' + maxAttempts + 's; webhook may not have fired. Check Stripe dashboard + dev API logs.'); });

request.description: Polling logic lives in the test script via pm.sendRequest. The actual top-level URL is a no-op probe.

item.name: 40 Order history loop
item.description: 5 customers x 5 orders each = 25 completed orders. For each: plate-selection -> kitchen-start-promotion -> list-pending-qr -> qr-scan -> enriched-pickups -> complete -> review. Not idempotent — creates new rows each run. To reset: bash scripts/purge_demo_data.sh && bash scripts/load_demo_data.sh

exec: if (!token) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No customer token — run folder 20 first'); return; }
// Use demo admin token for this internal cron operation
if (!qrId || !qrSig) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No QR code data — promotion may not have run or no active pickup'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping Complete order'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping review'); return; }
if (!token) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No customer token — run folder 20 first'); return; }
// Use demo admin token for this internal cron operation
if (!qrId || !qrSig) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No QR code data — promotion may not have run or no active pickup'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping Complete order'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping review'); return; }
if (!token) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No customer token — run folder 20 first'); return; }
// Use demo admin token for this internal cron operation

if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping Complete order'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping review'); return; }
if (!token) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No customer token — run folder 20 first'); return; }
// Use demo admin token for this internal cron operation

if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping Complete order'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping review'); return; }
if (!token) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No customer token — run folder 20 first'); return; }
// Use demo admin token for this internal cron operation
if (!qrId || !qrSig) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No QR code data — promotion may not have run or no active pickup'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping Complete order'); return; }
if (!pickupId) { pm.execution.skipRequest('No platePickupId — skipping review'); return; }

item.name: 99 Sanity checks
item.description: Read-only assertions. Verifies the demo dataset is complete.

exec: pm.test('At least 1 PE demo restaurant', () => { pm.expect(demo.length).to.be.at.least(1); });
const demo = users.filter(u => u.username && u.username.includes('@vianda.demo') && u.username.includes('demo.cliente.pe.'));
pm.test('5 PE demo customers exist', () => { pm.expect(demo.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test('At least 4 PE demo plates', () => { pm.expect(demo.length).to.be.at.least(4); });
pm.test('At least 5 completed orders (5 customers x 4+ orders)', () => { pm.expect(completed.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
pm.test('At least 5 active PE demo subscriptions', () => { pm.expect(active.length).to.be.at.least(5); });
